sidebar_no_characters: No characters yet — import a card to start.

sidebar_are_you_sure: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
sidebar_clear_chat_confirm: This is the last chat. Clear it to start fresh? All messages and memory will be removed.
sidebar_delete_branch_body: Delete the active branch and its messages? Main timeline will stay.
sidebar_switch_to_non_main: Switch to a non-main branch first
mes_example_mode_tooltip_always: Examples are included in every prompt
mes_example_mode_tooltip_once: Examples are only included in the first turn
mes_example_mode_tooltip_depth: Examples are injected at a specified depth from the end of chat history
mes_example_mode_tooltip_disabled: Examples are not sent to the model

depth_prompt_placeholder: Prompt injected at a specific depth...
system_prompt_override_placeholder: Leave empty to use the global prompt...

import_error_no_data: No character data found in the file.
trace_mobile_hint: Exact prompt assembly sent to the model on the last turn (System, Context, RAG, History).
trace_no_traces_yet: No traces recorded yet. Send a message to generate one.
no_starred_models: No favorite models yet. Star models in Provider Settings.
character_import_sub: Upload a PNG character card or JSON character file.
click_or_drop_file: Click or drop character file here
st_jsonl_png_supported: PNG character cards and JSON are supported

st_import_results: Imported: {personas} personas, {characters} characters, {chats} chats, {presets} presets, {lorebooks} lorebooks
st_no_files: No supported files found in the selected folder
chat_import_sub: Upload a SillyTavern JSONL history file.
click_or_drop_chat: Click or drop chat history here
import_invalid_format: Only SillyTavern JSONL chat files are supported here.
import_no_messages: No messages found in JSONL file.
drop_png_json: Drop PNG or JSON here or click to choose a file
import_surface_desc: PNG or JSON character cards create a new chat. Lorebook JSON attaches to the current character.
provider_settings_desc: Manage connections and generation parameters for AI providers.
provider_select_profile: Select a profile or create a new one.
profile_name_exists: A profile with this name already exists
enter_api_key_for_models: Enter an API key to load model list
no_connection_enter_key: No connection — enter an API key above
no_model_selected_begin: No model selected — choose a model to begin
stream_response_hint: On: character-by-character generation. Off: full response appears at once.
bind_to_favorite_model_hint: On: pick a favorite model and override its samplers / context budget without touching the profile base.
binding_no_favorites_hint: Favorite a model first to bind settings to it.
sampler_paste_invalid: Clipboard does not contain a valid sampler preset
no_models_returned: No models returned. Check endpoint URL and API key.
unsupported_image_format: Unsupported format. Use PNG, JPEG, WEBP, or GIF.
file_too_large: File too large. Maximum size is 20 MB.
vision_not_supported_desc: Your model doesn't support vision. Set a vision model in provider settings.
sampler_max_context_hint: Set to -1 to let the model decide how much to write.
context_pin_locked: Context size is pinned — won't change when switching models
sampler_temperature_hint: Randomness. Lower is steadier; higher is more creative. Recommended: 0.6–0.9 for RP, 1.0+ for chaos.
sampler_freq_penalty_hint: Penalizes tokens that already appeared often. Helps reduce repeated words. Recommended: 0–0.3; use negative values rarely.
sampler_pres_penalty_hint: Penalizes tokens once they have appeared, encouraging new topics. Recommended: 0–0.4 for RP.
sampler_top_k_hint: Limits sampling to the K most likely tokens. 0 usually means disabled. Recommended: 40–100 for local models.
sampler_top_p_hint: Nucleus sampling: keeps the smallest token set whose probability mass reaches P. Recommended: 0.9–0.98.
sampler_min_p_hint: Filters tokens below a fraction of the top token probability. Good for local models. Recommended: 0.02–0.10.
sampler_top_a_hint: Alternative probability cutoff used by some Kobold-style backends. Leave 0/off unless you know the model likes it.
sampler_typical_p_hint: Typical sampling favors tokens with expected surprise. Recommended: 0.95–1.0; 1 disables it on most backends.
sampler_tfs_z_hint: Tail Free Sampling removes low-value probability tail tokens. Recommended: 0.9–1.0; 1 usually means neutral.
sampler_repeat_last_n_hint: How far back repetition penalty looks. 0 may mean backend default/disabled. Recommended: 256–1024 for RP.
sampler_mirostat_hint: Adaptive sampling mode that targets a surprise level. 0 off, 1/2 enabled. Recommended: off unless tuning a local model.
sampler_mirostat_tau_hint: Mirostat target surprise. Higher is more varied. Recommended: 5–8 when Mirostat is enabled.
sampler_mirostat_eta_hint: Mirostat learning rate. Lower is smoother. Recommended: 0.05–0.2 when Mirostat is enabled.
sampler_dry_multiplier_hint: DRY repetition control strength. 0 disables. Recommended: 0.5–1.5 if the model loops.
sampler_dry_base_hint: DRY penalty growth base. Recommended: 1.75–2.0; leave default unless tuning loops.
sampler_dry_allowed_length_hint: Short repeats allowed before DRY starts penalizing. Recommended: 2–4.
sampler_dry_sequence_breakers_hint: Sequences that break DRY repetition matching, such as newline, colon, or quote.
sampler_xtc_threshold_hint: XTC removes overly predictable tokens above this threshold. Experimental. Recommended: 0.1–0.2.
sampler_xtc_probability_hint: Chance to apply XTC filtering. 0 disables. Experimental; try 0.3–0.5 only if supported.
sampler_rep_penalty_hint: Penalizes repeated tokens. 1 is neutral. Recommended: 1.05–1.20 for RP; too high can break style.
stop_seqs_hint: A list of trigger words where the model stops generating.
special_chars_hint: To stop the response with a trigger on a new line, click the ⏎ NL button before the template word. The ␣ Space button allows you to add a space (e.g., for an exact word match without sticking to adjacent words). The ⇥ Tab button is used in rare cases to stop inside tabular formats or code.
logit_bias_empty_hint: Enter text and click Tokenize, or add a token ID manually.
logit_bias_tooltip: Bias individual tokens after tokenization. Negative values suppress a token (-100 bans it); positive values make it more likely. Type a word/phrase, tokenize it, then adjust each token's slider. Use sparingly: token IDs are model/tokenizer-specific.
persona_manager_sub: Whose voice are you using in chat?
delete_persona_body: Are you sure? Persona {name} will be deleted permanently.
set_default_persona: Set as default for new chats
st_no_settings_json: settings.json not found in the selected folder.
cannot_delete_last_persona: You cannot delete the last persona.
prompt_manager_sub: System, post-history, and summary/tools instructions per preset.
preset_advanced_mode_hint: Add custom prompt injections with depth control
preset_prompt_order_canvas_hint: ST-like prompt order with built-in slots, custom cards, and chat markers
prompt_slot_world_info_before_hint: Slot for lorebooks with the "Before Char" position.
prompt_slot_world_info_after_hint: Slot for lorebooks with the "After Char" position.
enhance_definitions_placeholder: Prompt block that enriches character descriptions...
preset_import_sub: Import prompt blocks from a SillyTavern preset file into the current preset.
preset_import_drop_title: Click or drop a .json preset file
preset_import_parse_error: Could not parse this file as an ST preset.
delete_preset_body: Are you sure? Preset "{name}" will be deleted permanently.
no_presets_sub: Create a preset to start configuring prompts.
system_prompt_placeholder: System prompt instructions for the AI...
insert_depth_hint: Messages from the end to insert the note
authors_note_placeholder: Instructions injected near the end of context...
summary_placeholder: Write a concise summary of the chat so far...
ai_assistant_section_desc: Override default system prompts per mode. Leave empty to use defaults.
prompt_section_service_desc: These prompts are used for separate operations and do not affect the chat.
summary_desc: System prompt for chat memory summarization.
context_memory_sub: Create a concise summary of older chat history for model memory.
sticky_win_hint: How many turns the entry stays active after triggering
delay_hint: Delay in turns before first activation
close_without_saving_body: Closing now will discard your changes.
char_delete_confirm: Delete {name}? All chats with this character will be permanently deleted.
generate_more_tooltip: Queue another variant with the current model + preset
provider_error_auth_desc: Your API key may be invalid, expired, or missing for this provider.
provider_error_transient_desc: This is usually temporary — wait a moment and try again.
provider_error_empty_desc: The model returned no usable content. Try regenerating.
message_unavailable_no_provider: Message sending is unavailable until a provider profile is activated.
resend_unavailable_no_provider: Resend is unavailable until a provider profile is activated.
regen_unavailable_no_provider: Regeneration is unavailable until a provider profile is activated.
cannot_delete_main_branch: Cannot delete: active branch is the main timeline.
provider_save_connect_failed: Could not save and connect provider profile.
provider_name_url_required: Provider name and base URL are required to save a profile.
import_unsupported_type: Unsupported file type. Please upload a PNG character card, JSON file, or SillyTavern JSONL chat.
import_step1_desc: Drag and drop a JSON file or paste from clipboard.
import_merge_desc: Add imported entries alongside current ones.
import_replace_desc: Delete all current entries, then import.
import_new_desc: A new lorebook will be created from the imported file with all entries.
import_drop_browse: Drop JSON file here or browse
mobile_access_scan_qr: Scan this QR code with your phone
mobile_access_regenerate_confirm: This will invalidate the current token. Continue?
mobile_access_disable_confirm: This will revoke the access token. Continue?
mobile_access_firewall_warn: Make sure your firewall allows connections on port {port}
crop_avatar_subtitle: Drag to reposition · use slider to zoom
lorebooks_card_desc: Create knowledge entries activated by keywords
delete_lorebook_msg: This will delete the lorebook and all its entries.
lore_token_budget_hint: Maximum tokens the activated lore from this lorebook may occupy. Toggle ‘%’ to switch to percent-of-context mode (cap = model's context size × %).
lore_token_budget_switch_to_fixed: Switch to fixed token cap mode
lore_scan_depth_hint: How many chat messages back to scan for keywords.
lore_recursive_scanning_hint: After an entry activates, its content is also scanned for other entries' keys.
lore_entry_content_placeholder: Describe a fact, location, or rule...
lore_entry_ai_prompt_placeholder: Describe what this lorebook entry should contain...
lore_entry_ai_prompt_hint: Current entry content will be sent as edit context. The assistant returns content only.
lore_logic_any_hint: Activates if at least one secondary key is found.
lore_logic_all_hint: Activates only if all secondary keys are found.
lore_logic_none_hint: Activates only if none of the secondary keys are found.
lore_logic_not_all_hint: Activates if at least one secondary key is missing.
lore_position_hint: Where the activated entry is inserted into the final prompt. This affects placement, not whether the keywords match.
pos_before_char_hint: Insert before the character definition. Useful for rules or facts that should sit above the character card.
pos_after_char_hint: Insert after the character definition. Close to the common SillyTavern World Info default; good for most lore.
pos_before_examples_hint: Insert before example dialogs. Useful when lore should affect how example messages are interpreted.
pos_after_examples_hint: Insert after example dialogs. The entry stays in the main prompt but below examples.
pos_top_an_hint: Top AN = before Author's Note. Use for lore that should sit near the Author's Note and strongly steer the current scene.
pos_bottom_an_hint: Bottom AN = after Author's Note. Similar to Top AN, but placed below the note.
pos_at_depth_hint: Insert inside chat history at the selected depth. For example, depth 4 means roughly 4 messages before the end, close to current context.
pos_outlet_hint: SillyTavern/extension compatibility slot. A special outlet position; usually not needed for normal lore.
lore_depth_hint: For '@ Depth', how many messages back from the end to insert. For Top/Bottom AN, used as Author's Note depth when supported.
lore_priority_hint: Secondary priority for selection/sorting. The visual lorebook order now takes precedence for insertion order within the same position.
ignore_budget_hint: If enabled, this entry is always included even when the lorebook token budget is exceeded.
lore_char_filter_bind: Unbound (name only) — click to link to a character
group_scoring_hint: If set on any entry in the group, the entry with the most matched keys wins the group (instead of weighted random). This overrides group weights.
lore_test_placeholder: Type a message to test key activation...
lore_recursion_section_hint: Recursive scanning: after an entry activates, its content is scanned for other entries' keys. This lets one piece of lore pull in related lore.
constant_hint: Entry is always inserted into prompt regardless of keywords. Ignores key matching entirely.
case_sensitive_hint: Keys must match exact case. E.g. 'rose' won't match 'Rose'.
match_whole_words_hint: Key 'king' matches 'the king' but not 'liking'. Disable for languages without spaces (JP/CN).
probability_hint: Chance of activation when triggered. 100 = always, 50 = 50/50. Use for random events.
scan_depth_override_hint: How many messages back to scan for keys. -1 = use global setting.
exclude_recursion_hint: This entry cannot be activated by other entries mentioning its keywords.
prevent_recursion_hint: Once activated, this entry will not trigger any other entries through its content.
delay_until_recursion_hint: Only activates during recursive scanning, not on initial pass. Good for secondary/derived lore.
recursion_level_hint: Higher levels activate later in recursion chain. Level 1 activates first, then 2, etc.
group_hint: Only one entry per group is inserted. Use for mutually exclusive variants (e.g. weather types).
group_weight_hint: Higher weight = higher chance of being picked. Default 100.
prioritize_inclusion_hint: If set, this entry always wins its group and the others are skipped — group weights are ignored. Use it to force one canonical entry per group.
delete_entry_msg: This will delete this lorebook entry.
scripts_card_desc: JavaScript logic that runs during generation
delete_script_msg: This script and its code will be permanently deleted.
script_api_character: Character context (personality and scenario are mutable)
script_api_chat_injectMessage: Inject a message at the end of chat history (default role: system)
script_api_char_personality: Personality text — use += to inject into prompt
script_api_char_scenario: Scenario text — use += to inject into prompt
script_api_state_get: Read a value from persistent state
script_api_state_set: Write a value to persistent state
script_api_lore_entries: Array of currently activated lore entries
script_test_no_result: Run a test to see results
script_ai_prompt: Describe what the script should do...
script_ai_prompt_hint: Current editor code will be sent as context.
script_ai_context_hint: Enabled items will be included when generating.
script_ai_diff_too_large: The script is large, so the inline diff preview is hidden. Review the generated code if needed, then apply to replace the current script.
script_ai_no_providers: No providers configured. Add one in Settings.
delete_message_body: Choose whether to delete only the current swipe variant or remove the entire message.
import_md_dropzone: Drop .md file or click to browse
import_md_paste_placeholder: Paste character description in Markdown format...
placeholder_hint: The hall is quiet, but the story is ready to begin. Create your first character or import an existing one.
placeholder_select_character_chat: Select a character and chat to start talking.
wizard_path_a_sub: Connect AI provider, create persona, add character
wizard_path_b_sub: Import characters, chats, lorebooks, presets and personas
wizard_step_character: Who do you want to talk to?
wizard_persona_hint: Tell the AI who you are. You can skip this and set it up later.
wizard_character_hint: Create a character to chat with, import one, or skip.
wizard_avatar_hint: Optional — used in the UI and chat header.
wizard_character_simplified: This is a simplified creation — you can always edit the character in the Editor later.
wizard_st_hint: Select your SillyTavern data folder to import everything.
gallery_empty: No images yet — import to start
gallery_confirm_delete_msg: Delete {n} selected image(s)? This cannot be undone.
gallery_confirm_delete_single_msg: Delete this image from the gallery? This cannot be undone.
gallery_include_in_prompt_hint: Send this image's description to the AI in prompts
gallery_include_no_desc_warning: Describe this image first — without a description it won't be sent to the AI
gallery_no_description: No description — use edit or regenerate to add one
no_attachment_description_hint: No description — use edit or regenerate to add one.
attachment_delete_msg: Remove this attachment from the message? The file itself will be deleted.
refresh_models_vision_hint: Refresh models to see vision-capable options
select_provider_first: Select an AI provider in the gear settings first.
preview_char_message: "The door groans as a tall figure steps from the shadows, silver eyes catching what little light remains."
preview_user_message: Hello? Are you... are you hurt?
vmd_editor_hint: Headings are locked. Edit the prose freely; PERSONALITY is always present.
vmd_examples_in_body_hint: Example messages live in the # EXAMPLES section above. This controls how they inject into context.
version_switch_dirty_body: Switching the version will discard your unsaved edits. Save first, or switch and lose them.
version_delete_body: Delete version "{title}"? Its snapshot cannot be recovered.
version_delete_active: The active version cannot be deleted.
